name: Seribu Tahun
overview: Imaan, pregnant and abandoned by her boyfriend Azrul after his mother insults her, crosses paths with Shukri and Norr, a couple who desperately wants a child but faces health struggles.

trailers.title: [EPISOD PENUH] Seribu Tahun - EP1 | Noorkhiriah, Emma Maembong, Azhan Rani
